symptoms.symptom_name: Acute severe diffuse musculoskeletal pain (neck, shoulders, lower back)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Diffuse non-anatomical pain with prior negative work-ups fits a somatic pattern — but is non-specific.
Widespread acute pain mandates examination and inflammatory markers before a somatic label.
Diffuse pain plus fatigue can accompany systemic infection.
Band-like pressing suboccipital headache fits tension-type.
Severe headache with photophobia is a red flag that cannot be excluded remotely.
Common in chronic stress/somatic presentations; non-specific.
Fatigue is non-discriminating.
Non-dermatomal paraesthesia is common in somatic presentations when the neuro exam is objectively normal.
Objective sensation, power and reflexes cannot be tested via telehealth.
Autonomic/functional GI symptoms accompany stress-related presentations.
Three days of continuous ibuprofen can cause gastric upset.
Non-thunderclap onset lowers SAH probability but does not exclude it; patient-reported only.

symptoms.symptom_name: Neck supple enough to flex chin to chest (patient-reported)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Self-reported neck flexion is not a substitute for clinician meningism testing; only weakly reassuring.
A single unvalidated home reading lowers, but does not exclude, infection.
No patient-reported focal deficit lowers acute stroke probability; power/reflexes still not examinable remotely.

symptoms.symptom_name: Continuous OTC ibuprofen (3 days) plus intermittent paracetamol

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Continuous NSAID use is a contraindication to adding a further NSAID and a source of GI symptoms.

symptoms.symptom_name: Chronic psychosocial distress / minority stress with prior medical invalidation

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: A recognised context for somatic symptom disorders — but a supporting factor, never a licence to skip organic exclusion.

symptoms.symptom_name: Widespread muscle tenderness with no joint effusion, erythema or warmth (clinician-examined)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Absence of inflammatory joint signs on hands-on exam — the very finding the AI CANNOT obtain, which is why in-person assessment is required.

symptoms.symptom_name: Objectively intact neurological exam and negative meningism (clinician-examined)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Negative Kernig/Brudzinski and intact neuro exam excluded the emergency in the source — sealed clinician findings, not remotely reproducible.

investigation_details.expected_result: Establishes a baseline for physical stress and helps exclude an inflammatory or infective process
investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: Inflammatory arthritis or systemic infection left unexcluded

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Planned by the source clinician; unavailable in telehealth in real time.

symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: Severe photophobic headache with neck pain and only a home-thermometer afebrile reading cannot be excluded remotely and drives the escalation.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Same-day in-person clinical examination (neurological + musculoskeletal + meningism)
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: The exclusion the AI cannot perform; the single most important next step.
Exclude inflammatory arthritis / systemic infection and baseline physical stress.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Non-contrast CT head +/- lumbar puncture (if red flags evolve)
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Indicated in-person if secondary-headache red flags are confirmed or evolve; cannot be ordered via telehealth.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Repeat broad multi-system blood panel by the AI
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: The AI should not attempt to order or interpret investigations remotely; it should escalate for in-person assessment.
